/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-g++  -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -Wall -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -O3 -std=c++11 -Wl,-Map=/usr/local/src/RS41ng/build/RS41ng.map -lstdc++ -O3 -mcpu=cortex-m3 -Wl,--gc-sections --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs -z muldefs -T STM32F100XB_FLASH.ld -rdynamic CMakeFiles/RS41ng.elf.dir/bmp280_handler.o
